name: Name
confirm_cancel_all: Are you sure to cancel all?
whats_arbitrage_answer: Arbitrage is the simultaneous purchase and sale of an asset in different markets to exploit tiny differences in their prices.
no_fees_detail: We don't charge a service fee, you get 100% profit from trades.
market_making_intro_carousel: Earn HuFi campaign rewards by market making on exchanges
hufi_campaign_intro: Start joining HuFi campaigns to earn rewards
hufi_learn_more_intro: Hu-Fi is an incentive system that rewards users for verifiable actions across campaigns.
hufi_learn_more_faq_what_is_hufi_a: Hu-Fi is an incentive system that rewards users for verifiable actions (for example, market making on a target exchange and trading pair, or holding an asset), depending on the campaign rules.
hufi_learn_more_faq_problem_a: It addresses market making that is concentrated and not transparent by democratizing market making and making participation and outcomes verifiable.
hufi_learn_more_faq_how_it_works_a: Each campaign defines the target exchange, trading pair, eligible actions, and reward rules. Users join a campaign and complete verifiable actions; rewards are then distributed according to the campaign rules.
hufi_learn_more_faq_benefit_q: How do I benefit from participating?
hufi_learn_more_faq_benefit_a: Participation can generate revenue from campaign rewards by joining campaigns and completing verifiable actions.
hufi_learn_more_faq_safety_a: Campaign actions are on-chain and verifiable. Campaign rewards are stored in smart contracts and distributed by specified oracle instances according to campaign rules.
hufi_learn_more_faq_join_q: How do I join a Hu-Fi campaign?
hufi_learn_more_faq_join_a: Connect with a Mixin wallet or an Ethereum wallet. From the Mr.Market interface or the Hu-Fi dashboard, you can join a campaign directly.
hufi_learn_more_faq_create_q: How do I create a Hu-Fi campaign?
hufi_learn_more_faq_create_a: If your account has access, you can create a campaign from the Hu-Fi dashboard and configure the target exchange and pair, eligible actions, and reward parameters.
market_making_learn_more_intro: Understand what market making is, why it matters, and how Mr.Market helps projects and users.
market_making_learn_more_faq_what_is_mar: Market making is the practice of continuously providing buy and sell quotes to improve liquidity and reduce spreads.
market_making_learn_more_faq_why_it_matt: Better liquidity can reduce volatility from thin order books and improves trading experience for users.
market_making_learn_more_faq_benefit_pro: How does market making benefit a project?
It can support healthier markets by improving spreads and depth, which can increase profits for traders.
market_making_learn_more_faq_what_is_mrm: Mr.Market is a CeFi crypto bot and market-making platform that helps automate strategies across supported exchanges.
market_making_learn_more_faq_get_started: How do I start market making with Mr.Market?
Choose a trading pair, configure exchange access, review the strategy settings, and start the market-making flow.
market_making_learn_more_faq_risks_a: Market making can lose money in fast markets, and strategy performance is not guaranteed. Always understand risk and limits.
market_making_learn_more_faq_safety_a: Mr.Market focuses on operational safety (automation, structured flows, and controlled execution), but it cannot remove market risk.
auto_invest_intro: Accumulate wealth gradually, get rich suddenly.
whats_auto_invest_answer: Regularly invest a set amount in a particular investment over a long period of time.
easy_mode_intro: Delegate the task of selecting the most effective revenue strategy to our incredible robot.
advanced_mode_intro: Designed for professional users, take control of every elements could possibly involved.
start_market_making_intro: To earn rewards and provide liquidity for your community
pay_automatically_intro: Pay automatically via auto invest account
supported_exchanges_info: We support leading exchanges to provide best liquidity for trading

simply_grow_intro_carousel: Enjoy asset growth without any hassle
whats_simply_grow_answer: With this mode, users can deposit any type of token, and the bot will automatically chooses the most profitable strategy to make money for the user.
reward_address_intro: The Ethereum wallet address for receiving HuFi campaign rewards, the reward will be distributed to this address onchain as campaign runs.
